name: ARTERIOVENOUS RENAL CONNECTION

demographics.Path: single dilated feeding artery + single draining vein

discriminating_features: early enhancement of draining vein + renal vein + IVC
intraparenchymal / subcapsular / perirenal hematoma (as a result of bleeding)
focally attenuated and displaced collecting system

general: early enhancement of draining vein + renal vein + IVC
intraparenchymal / subcapsular / perirenal hematoma (as a result of bleeding)
focally attenuated and displaced collecting system
supplied by multiple segmental / interlobar arteries of normal caliber
US: focal area of aliasing / color saturation ← high flow rate + vessel tortuosity
⇑ flow velocity + ⇓ resistance in feeding artery
ANGIO: detailed vascular anatomy for planning embolic occlusion
diminished nephrogram ± cortical atrophy distal to fistula ← reduced flow to renal

clinical.Prognosis: spontaneous closure within a few months
